economic_ownership_map.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
economic_ownership_map.evidence: $10.856B ETH fair value divided by 579,652,432 shares at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 digital asset table). Low case applies ~40% ETH mark haircut from May marks.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Look-through ETH per diluted common share before trajectory and operating overlays.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low case applies ETH mark haircut; high case modest premium to May marks.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.

economic_ownership_map.label: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Base aligns with scenarios.base.sotp_build eth_growth_net_dilution (+$4.5/sh): 8% ETH CAGR for 7 years offset by 10% cumulative ATM dilution [Assumption]. Bear embeds dilution exceeding token appreciation.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Incremental per-share value from ETH beta net of issuance, not double-counted with static look-through.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year Lawrence horizon aligned with yield-curve stance gate.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes moderate ETH appreciation with partial dilution offset; bear assumes dilution dominates.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Further ATM issuance is the primary remaining owner-funded dilution risk.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Probability, timing, and dilution pace are inside the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.

economic_ownership_map.label: Staking and legacy operating cash (capitalized)
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 staking and validation revenue $56.924M on 579.7M shares; modest margin capitalized at 10 times [Assumption] in base payoff build.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Small operating annuity from staking yield; legacy mining immaterial.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Does not double-count ETH fair value; yield is incremental operating cash.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.

economic_ownership_map.label: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Warrant liability $2.1M and deferred tax liability $92.3M at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026); BMNP preferred stock claims not fully modeled [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Reserve for senior claims and tax on unrealized crypto gains; base zero pending preferred waterfall.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Negative additive; preferred waterfall pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.

judgments.evidence: Base aligns with scenarios.base.sotp_build eth_growth_net_dilution (+$4.5/sh): 8% ETH CAGR for 7 years offset by 10% cumulative ATM dilution [Assumption]. Bear embeds dilution exceeding token appreciation.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Look-through ETH per diluted common share before trajectory and operating overlays.

top_value_drivers.label: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Incremental per-share value from ETH beta net of issuance, not double-counted with static look-through.

top_value_drivers.label: Staking and legacy operating cash (capitalized)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Small operating annuity from staking yield; legacy mining immaterial.

blockers: eth_look_through_today: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
eth_trajectory_net_dilution: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
staking_and_legacy_cash: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required
warrants_tax_preferred_reserve: material component is legacy_sensitivity; a valid calculation proof is required

falsifiers: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.
ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.
Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.
Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
